name: TestIso11783IL_OPDeactivate
title: TestIso11783IL_OPDeactivate
description: The function terminates the connection to the Virtual Terminal.
The Delete Object Pool command is executed to log off from the Virtual Terminal. The Maintenance message is not longer sent. The Object Pool API changes to state Not Active.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
